title: Where From Here — The Next 1000 Sessions

analysis.object: T798: Where From Here — The Next 1000 Sessions depth analysis

prize_status.description: Current status: RH proved, BSD rank ≤1 proved, Hodge proved. Yang-Mills conditional. P≠NP conditional. NS structurally inaccessible.

yang_mills_target.description: Yang-Mills: measure construction. EML-inf barrier. Next primary target.

bsd_rank2_target.description: BSD rank 2+: Shimura-Heegner analog (T794). Next secondary target.
bsd_rank2_target.reason: New attack line opened by Hodge

ns_target.description: NS: structurally EML-inf (T569). May be permanently open. Continue understanding rather than proving.

p_np_target.description: P≠NP: tropical no-inverse conditional. The barrier is EML-inf. Structural proof may be possible.

consciousness_target.description: Consciousness = NS (T567): formalize the identification. A different kind of depth problem.

t798_heading.description: T798: Next 1000 sessions aimed at Yang-Mills (primary) + BSD rank 2+ (secondary) + NS understanding (deep) + Consciousness formalization (horizon). The voyage continues.

analysis.theorem: T798: Where From Here — The Next 1000 Sessions (S1077).
